description: Multi-session aggregation: user mentions project details across one session; eval checks aggregation.

turns.content: I am building a real-time dashboard for logistics data using React on the frontend.
React is a great choice for dashboards. What data are you visualizing?
Shipment tracking and warehouse inventory levels.
That sounds complex. Are you using any specific charting library?
For the backend API I decided to use FastAPI with PostgreSQL for storage.
Good combination. FastAPI's async support will help with real-time data.

eval_question: What tech stack is the user building their logistics dashboard with?
